scored_tasks.description: Verify always-thinking improves output quality on multi-step reasoning tasks
scored_tasks.notes: Adaptive thinking already engaged on complex tasks; delta unclear without controlled A/B

scored_tasks.description: Measure latency and token cost increase with always-thinking enabled
scored_tasks.notes: Estimated 30-50% token increase per turn. Latency increase proportional. Confounded by adaptive thinking already providing variable depth.

decision_rationale: Confounded with adaptive thinking (default behavior). Negative speedup ratio (-0.35) due to increased latency and token consumption without measurable quality improvement over adaptive baseline. Requires controlled deconfounded pilot comparing adaptive-only vs always-on before reconsideration. No-go for default promotion.
